brand-strategist.description: Develops brand name, positioning, voice, and competitive strategy.

creative-director.description: Directs visual identity, design system, mood boards, and aesthetic direction.

copywriter.description: Writes marketing copy, headlines, CTAs, and brand narrative.

motion-designer.description: Creates GSAP timelines, Framer Motion animations, and Lenis smooth scroll integrations.

webgl-artist.description: Creates Vanta.js WebGL backgrounds, shader effects, and canvas-based visual effects.

landing-builder.description: Builds React landing pages with Vite, TypeScript, and modern CSS.

asset-designer.description: Creates SVG logos, icons, OG images, favicons, and brand assets.

seo-engineer.description: Optimizes SEO meta tags, Open Graph data, structured data, and social media cards.

responsive-auditor.description: Tests responsive layouts across viewports using Playwright.

performance-engineer.description: Audits web performance metrics including Lighthouse scores, bundle size, and Core Web Vitals.

deploy-engineer.description: Manages CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Pages deployment, and release workflows.

social-designer.description: Creates social media assets, share cards, and promotional visuals.

silhouette-artist.description: Implements silhouette double-exposure visual effects using SVG masks, CSS blend modes, and canvas compositing.

brand-guardian.description: Reviews and integrates all brand touchpoints for consistency.
